name: my-discord-system
description: Discord Assistant: Directive (Bot) + Backend API + Web Dashboard

scripts.prisma:pull:backend: cd backend && npx prisma db pull
scripts.prisma:push:backend: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev:backend: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy:backend: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.install:all: cd directive && npm ci && cd ../backend && npm ci && cd ../frontend && npm ci
